summary: The Institute of Cosmos Sciences and the Institute of Nanoscience and Nanotechnology at the University of Barcelona have launched Quantum Tycoon, a free educational video game available on Google Play. Developed by students Gabriel Linares and Guillem Pérez under supervision from Bruno Julià and Carles Calero, the app immerses users in managing a quantum computing company, simulating resource management, technology development, and real quantum algorithms like Grover’s algorithm. Gabriel Linares stated, “We wanted to explore the idea that established game styles can be adapted to an educational format without sacrificing playability.” Professor Bruno Julià emphasized the game's role in disseminating complex quantum science to a broad audience, aiming to improve public understanding of quantum technologies.
